channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Tulane QB Mensah transfers to Duke; Mississippi State’s Van Buren and Cal’s Mendoza enter portal
item.description: Former Tulane quarterback Darian Mensah has already found a new program in Duke, while Mississippi State's Michael Van Buren Jr. and Cal’s Fernando Mendoza are exploring changes of their own in the transfer portal.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Bowl games miss out on 4 CFP teams, the latest twist and turn for college football's postseason
item.description: First-round games in the College Football Playoff mean four ranked teams won't make traditional bowls.
item.dc:creator: Mark Long, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Deebo Samuel doubles down on frustrations after social media post flagged by community notes on X
item.description: Niners star Deebo Samuel doubled down on a social media post he made this week expressing frustrations over the limited opportunities that he blamed for his lack of productivity.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Girls Basketball: Point Loma 36, Mar Vista 22
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Girls hoops in Point Loma with the Pointers hosting Mar Vista. Pointers win this one 36-22.
item.dc:creator: Fox 5

item.title: Buccaneers & Habitat Hillsborough join forces for Holiday Home Build and Revival
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers and Habitat for Humanity of Hillsborough joined forces once again to address affordable housing in Hillsborough County.
item.dc:creator: Aileen Hnatiuk, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Mendenhall excited to take over at Utah State
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The Bronco Mendenhall era has begun at Utah State. Mendenhall was introduced as the Aggies new head football coach Monday, and the school is hoping he can turn the program around.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Cubs announce 2025 coaching staff
item.description: CHICAGO — The Cubs announced its 2025 coaching staff Monday under the helm of second-year manager Craig Counsell. There are four new additions to his staff, including replacements for third base coach Willie Harris and first base coach Mike Napoli.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Kalani Sitake signs long-term contract extension
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Coming off a 10-2 season, BYU has signed head coach Kalani Sitake to a long-term contract extension that will keep him in Provo well into the future.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Indiana plays Chicago on 8-game road slide
item.description: Indiana Pacers (9-14, 10th in the Eastern Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (10-13, eighth in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Friday, 8 p.m. EST BETMGM SPORTSBOOK LINE: Pacers -3; over/under is 247 BOTTOM LINE: Indiana travels to Chicago looking to break its eight-game road losing streak.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Dosunmu's first career triple-double leads Bulls 139-124 over Spurs
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — Nikola Vucevic had a season-high 39 points, Ayo Dosunmu had 27 points, 11 assists and 10 rebounds and the Chicago Bulls beat the San Antonio Spurs 139-124 on Thursday night with Victor Wembanyama sidelined with a back injury.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Hagel scores 2, Point has 4 assists in Lightning's 8-1 win over Sharks
item.description: Brayden Point had four assists and Brandon Hagel scored twice to lead the Tampa Bay Lightning to an 8-1 victory against the San Jose Sharks. Jake Guentzel, Conor Geekie and Cam Atkinson each scored a goal and assist. Anthony Cirelli, Nick Perbix and Nicholas Paul scored the Lightning’s other goals.
item.dc:creator: ERIK ERLENDSSON, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Aggies win MWC opener over Wyoming, 70-67
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The undefeated streak is still going for the Aggies. Ian Martinez scored 17 of his 23 points in the second half to help Utah State defeat Wyoming 70-67 on Wednesday night at The Spectrum. Mason Falslev's layup with 35 seconds left stretched Utah State's lead to 70-64.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Providence College AD apologizes for offensive religious chant toward BYU basketball team
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4) -- The athletic director at Providence College -- an East Coast catholic university -- apologized to Brigham Young University on social media for offensive chants made by the student section during Tuesday's men's basketball game.
item.dc:creator: Aubree B. Jennings, ABC 4
